positive: A minimalist, stylized woodland scene featuring interlocking silhouettes of pine trees, deer leaping through foliage, and abstract mountain peaks at sunrise. The style should be graphic and illustrative, reminiscent of linocut prints mixed with modern botanical etching. Use a limited color palette of deep forest greens, muted terracotta orange, and cream off-white, emphasizing strong contrast and clean edges. Composition must be circular and symmetrical, designed for seamless repetition as an apparel print. Flat lay perspective, high detail, vector art style, clean composition, rule of thirds.
